posts.author: M_Glass (Michelle Glass)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone!

Sharing an upcoming free webinar you might be interested in.

Still stuck with manual data entry, scattered boards, and workflows that “kind of” work?

If any of these sound familiar, it’s time to fix it:

Re-entering the same info in multiple places
Spending hours on setup that should be automated
Chasing updates and manually maintaining statuses
Task management that turns into nonstop busywork

This is exactly what we’re tackling in our free live webinar.

Date: Feb 24, 2026
Time: 2-3 pm EST
Speaker: Tara Horn, Simpleday CEO

You’ll learn how to eliminate repetitive tasks, improve handoffs, and build a system that supports growth — without adding more overhead.

Plus, we’ll share a real case study on how we cut admin time by 50% through eliminating double entry and building a connected workflow.

Learn more + register here: https://simpledaysolutions.short.gy/webinar5
